description: A signed record of a post-translation edit. Corrections are the primary signal an observer uses to detect lens quality issues; the reason taxonomy decouples 'lens was wrong' from 'the world is complicated'.

main.description: A specific edit to the output of an encounter, attributed by reason.

encounter.description: The encounter whose output was edited.

path.description: JSON Pointer or equivalent path into the produced output identifying the edited location.

originalValue.description: The value prior to correction. May be elided for visibility reasons.

reason.description: Fixed taxonomy at the Lexicon level. Aggregators filter or weight by reason; corrections of different reasons signal different things about a lens.

rationale.description: Optional human-readable justification for the correction.
